title: QIFU Purple Balloons Lilac Balloon, 50pcs White and Purple Balloon with Confetti Balloons, Lilac Latex Helium Ballon Birthday Party Decoration for Girl Woman Birthday Wedding Baby Shower Bridal Party
features: 💜【Purple Balloons Package】: Lilac and white balloons included 20pcs macaron lilac balloons+10pcs metallic purple ballons+10pcs pearl white baloons+10pcs purple confetti balloons+2pcs purple and white balloon ribbons. The perfect color combination meets all your party imagination.

💜【Premium Material】: Our purple birthday balloons are made of high quality, safe, non-toxic and environmentally friendly latex. You can blow them directly or use a helium balloon canister to inflate them with air or helium to the right size or use balloon sticks to complete your party. Please enjoy your wonderful time.

💜【Happy DIY Time】: You can tie these lilac party balloons to doors, walls, ceilings and other places you want to decorate, or you can tie them together with hinges and enjoy your time.Just inflate the happy birthday balloons add it to the strip and join the balloons.

💜【Wide Range Of Uses】: The purple lilac balloons to make garlands and arch for woman girlfriend. This balloon is a great gift for birthday party, diwali decorations, wedding, bridal affair, Valentine's Day, graduation, annversary, baby shower, engagement.and outdoor or indoor holiday celebrations.Our pastel balloon garland arch kit adds a delightful and celebratory touch to your events.

💜【Attention & Warning】:QIFU recommended to inflate the balloon slowly until it is the right size to avoid bursting. Avoid exposing the balloon to high temperatures and avoid puncturing the balloon with sharp objects. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us.
description: Product Description QIFU 52 Pcs Purple and White Balloons Set with Purple Confetti Latex Balloons！ What will you receive？ 12 inch macaron lilac balloons x 20 12 inch metallic purple balloons x 10 12 inch white balloons x 10 12 inch purple confetti balloons x 10 2 pc purple and white balloon ribbons Purple White Balloon Arch Kit We will offer you 52pcs purple white balloon arch kit, sufficient quantity to meet your various needs. Suitable for All Kinds of Party Our balloons set is perfect for boys girls birthday party, baby shower, wedding, bridal shower, anniversary celebration, graduation. Romantic Wedding Balloon Decoration The romantic colour combination is popular and good-looking at the moment and it will bring a different texture to you. Our Purple White Balloon Set for Girls Women Party, Birthday, Wedding, Gender Reveal, Baby Shower!
